pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to match the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or meeting the target JDK requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus platform version to 3.13.3 to support Java 21 and new features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Quarkus versions may not fully support Java 21 or may have compatibility issues with the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Quarkus RESTEasy Reactive dependency with the new Quarkus REST extension.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'quarkus-resteasy-reactive' artifact is deprecated/removed in newer Quarkus versions; using it causes build failures or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Bump Maven compiler plugin version to 3.13.0 for better Java 21 support.
Bump Maven Surefire plugin version to 3.5.0.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native-micro.general_idea: Add explicit file permission setting during the COPY step to ensure the native executable is executable by the non-root user.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Update the base image tag from a specific version to 'latest' to ensure compatibility with the newer JDK runtime environment.
Add --chmod=554 to the COPY instruction to explicitly set file permissions for the native runner binary.

src/main/java/org/example/GreetingConfig.general_idea: Refactor config prefix and property names to align with a new configuration structure.
Add a new configuration property for default delay.

src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Remove OpenTelemetry instrumentation annotations that are no longer used or compatible with the new Quarkus version.
src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.why_exists: The imports `io.opentelemetry.api.trace.SpanKind` and `io.opentelemetry.instrumentation.annotations.WithSpan` are removed, and the `@WithSpan` annotation is removed from the method. If these imports/annotations remained but the library was removed or changed, it would cause a compile error.

src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Update base path for the REST resource to follow API versioning conventions.
Inject a new utility class for handling delays and evaluations.
Refactor the hello endpoint to remove subprocess execution and rely on config message.
Add new endpoints for delayed hello responses.
Add error handling endpoints and exception mapper for testing error scenarios.
Add necessary imports for new error handling and response types.
src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.why_exists: Without these imports, the new code using `BadRequestException`, `Response`, `ServerExceptionMapper`, and `RestResponse` will fail to compile.

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Update the application version number in the HTML title to reflect the new release version.
Add CSS styles for new API endpoint buttons to the index page.
Update the displayed application version and Quarkus version in the information section.
Replace generic Quarkus starter documentation links with specific API endpoint links for the observability app.

Enable OpenAPI inclusion for health endpoints in Quarkus.

src/test/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Update the test endpoint path to match the new API routing structure.
